title: Analyzing SARS-CoV-2 Spike Protein Expression in E. coli
steps: Discuss preparation and expression of spike-SUMO fusion protein in E. coli. Expressing SARS-CoV-2 Spike, RBD and SUMO Proteins in E. coli · Benchling.pdf
Use Benchling to calculate sizes of spike-SUMO and RBD-SUMO.
Are the proteins from Step 2 seen on Coomassie stain of SDS-PAGE? Coomassie stain of SDS-PAGE containing soluble, insoluble samples of spike-SUMO and RBD-SUMO from two E. coli cell lines.
creator: Harley King
